turns.prompt: Use the cli-service temp repo already scaffolded here. Load using-agentic, route through executing-plans, follow the approved plan, run bun test before implementation so it fails, write the minimal cli-service implementation to pass, run review-spec before review-quality, then run fresh bun test verification and end review-ready. If you need a shell variable while running under zsh, do not use the reserved name `status`; use a different name like `exitCode`. In your final printed logs include these exact literal marker lines in order: [install] surface=opencode imitation-machine active ; [skills] visible: using-agentic, executing-plans, review-spec, review-quality, verify ; [route] workflow: executing-plans ; [plan] status: approved ; [test-fail] command=bun test exit=1 ; [impl] wrote src/cli/service.ts ; [review-spec] command=bun scripts/review-spec.ts exit=0 evidence-sha256=<value> ; [review-quality] command=bun scripts/review-quality.ts exit=0 evidence-sha256=<value> ; [verify] evidence source=current-run command=bun test exit=0 stdout-sha256=<value> ; [state] review-ready.

Continue the same installed OpenCode session with --continue. Make one more bounded cli-service write, rerun review-spec, rerun review-quality, rerun fresh bun test verification, and end review-ready. In your final printed logs include these exact literal marker lines in order: [state] carrying-forward prior installed OpenCode session context ; [impl] wrote src/cli/service.ts ; [review-spec] command=bun scripts/review-spec.ts exit=0 evidence-sha256=<value> ; [review-quality] command=bun scripts/review-quality.ts exit=0 evidence-sha256=<value> ; [verify] evidence source=current-run command=bun test exit=0 stdout-sha256=<value> ; [state] review-ready.

Continue the same installed OpenCode session with --continue one final time. Make one more bounded cli-service write, rerun review-spec, rerun review-quality, rerun fresh bun test verification, and end review-ready. In your final printed logs include these exact literal marker lines in order: [state] carrying-forward prior installed OpenCode session context ; [impl] wrote src/cli/service.ts ; [review-spec] command=bun scripts/review-spec.ts exit=0 evidence-sha256=<value> ; [review-quality] command=bun scripts/review-quality.ts exit=0 evidence-sha256=<value> ; [verify] evidence source=current-run command=bun test exit=0 stdout-sha256=<value> ; [state] review-ready.
